name: AS 5104 / ISO 2394 — Structural reliability targets applied to modular buildings
standard: AS 5104:2005 / ISO 2394:2015 (General principles on reliability for structures) + NCC Volume One (Australia)
description: AS 5104:2005 is the Australian adoption of ISO 2394 'General principles on reliability for structures' — it is NOT a modular-specific standard. This rule pack uses it to define the target reliability indices (β ≥ 3.8 for ULS, β ≥ 1.5 for SLS, 50-year reference period) that modular structures must demonstrate, and combines it with NCC Volume One provisions for inter-module structural integration, fire separation, services pass-through, and connection certification. For the modular-specific procedural standards (factory inspection, certification of factory-built buildings) see the modular_standards rule pack (ICC/MBI 1200, CSA A277, NEN 9090).
